guidelines: Keep complexity budgets explicit, measured, and repayable.
Do not use a budget adjustment to authorize unrelated implementation scope.

intent.problem: The authorized plan document measures 9732 Markdown lines while the confirmed ceiling is 9550, causing the existing quality gate to fail.
constraints: Change only the Markdown ceiling and its repayment record.
Do not start any planned feature Work Item.
Keep the budget gate blocking and evidence-based.
intent.rationale: A bounded, repayable reservation is required to let the already-authorized plan document pass its existing measured quality gate; the final cleanup Work Item will repay it.
